scope_lock.source: Tạo cửa hàng ở phía admin: khi tạo cho phép chọn user owner hoặc tạo mới user owner cho cửa hàng; áp dụng gói mặc định thấp nhất nếu chưa có data gói; đồng thời triển khai chức năng quản lý người dùng tenant (users, khác admin-users).
in_scope: Admin transactional tenant creation (Tenant + first OWNER user) via new POST /admin/tenants
Create the OWNER user with a required username (user.username is NOT NULL); fullName + username + optional email/phone + password/generate
Seed three per-tenant roles OWNER/MANAGER/STAFF (tenantId=<new>) inside the creation tx, cloning grants from system role templates; link first OWNER to the per-tenant OWNER
Additive schema: AuditAction TENANT_CREATE and USER_CREATE enum values
New permission admin.tenant:create and admin.tenant-user:{view,manage} catalog + role grants (SUPER_ADMIN, SALER)
Tenant user management module (list/create/edit/change-role/deactivate/reactivate/reset-password) scoped by tenantId, distinct from platform admin-users

Seat enforcement: effective_max_users = (ACTIVE/TRIALING subscription plan.maxUsers ?? 0) + tenant.seatBonus; block create when no seat; first OWNER exempt at creation; optional seatBonus (1..999, default 10) settable at creation
Admin UI: Create-tenant form on tenant list, and tenant user management panel on tenant detail
Audit for tenant creation and every tenant-user mutation
out_of_scope: Assigning a subscription/plan during tenant creation (deferred to existing subscription UI/API in admin-plan-subscription-management)
Auto-seeding a starter plan when the plan table is empty (superseded by 'no plan at creation' decision)
Selecting a pre-existing user from another tenant as owner (users are tenant-scoped; only new owner is created)
Tenant self-service signup or in-tenant (Owner/Manager) staff management screens inside the store app
Advanced-mode roles (Warehouse/Cashier/Viewer) and custom role builder
Hard delete of tenants or users (soft delete/deactivate only)

related_specs.relationship: coordination-only; parallel implementation; shared AuditAction/seed contracts
blocks public registration until reusable tenant owner/role creation contract is available

design_context.discovery_reason: Multi-table transactional creation (tenant+user+role link), additive schema enum change, new permission catalog entries, seat/quota enforcement, and cross-layer backend/frontend contracts.
design_context.validation_recommended_reason: Schema change, permission-sensitive admin APIs, transactional user provisioning, seat enforcement, and 5+ task files.
